items.content: JUST IN: Brent crude oil falls after reports the US and Iran are discussing a 45-day ceasefire that could permanently end the war.
Crypto Markets Rally as Trump Teases Potential Iran Peace Deal. Bitcoin hit $69,500 after Trump suggested a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz could be reached within 24 hours.
Chances of this happening are zero to slim.... US, Iran discuss potential two phase deal including 45-day ceasefire - Axios/JPost
JUST IN: Iran warns that the next phase of its attacks on the United States and Israel will be more forceful, signaling further escalation, even when ceasefire negotiations ongoing.
Looks like Trump has lied his way into a corner, trying to lie his way out. Mediators push for 45-day truce in Iran war - Axios/rt.com
US, Iran in talks for a 45-day ceasefire to pave the way for lasting peace. Two-phase framework aims to de-escalate, reopen Strait of Hormuz, progress on Iran's uranium program.
In phone interview with Fox, Trump said deal to end conflict in Iran could be reached by Monday. Iran rejected US proposal for 48-hour ceasefire sent through intermediaries.
Trump Says He's Not Ruling out Ground Troops If Iran Doesn't Take Deal - Epoch Times
Oil prices now crossing above $115/barrel in US. Models indicate if sustained ~7 more weeks, US CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7% - highest since Sep 2023.
BREAKING: US stock market futures fall at open as Trump declares Tuesday as 'Power Plant and Bridge Day' in Iran. S&P -0.7%, Nasdaq -0.8%, WTI Crude +3.0%.
BREAKING: US oil prices surge above $114/barrel as US market futures officially reopen after 3-day weekend.
JUST IN: $69,000 Bitcoin. $100,000,000 worth of crypto shorts liquidated in the past 90 minutes.

high_signal_items.content: Brent crude oil FALLS after reports US and Iran discussing 45-day ceasefire - potential permanent end to war
Bitcoin hit $69,500 - Trump teases Iran peace deal, Strait of Hormuz reopening
Iran warns next attacks will be MORE FORCEFUL even as ceasefire negotiations ongoing
US-Iran 45-day ceasefire framework: de-escalate + reopen Hormuz + uranium program progress
Trump (Fox News): deal possible by Monday. Iran rejected 48-hour ceasefire proposal
Oil above $115/barrel → CPI inflation projected at 3.7% in 7 weeks if sustained
S&P -0.7%, Nasdaq -0.8% at open. Trump declares Tuesday 'Power Plant and Bridge Day' in Iran
